cite.text: Central command LOSES to its own information latency: the plan is ~50 ticks stale when computed and ~42 in transit, and forms NO opportunistic chains (≥2-hop share 0.000). N=240/7,500t: claims delivered 2096.0 vs command 1954.8 (Δ −141.2, p=0.001, 0/8 seeds). Command never beats claims.

numbers.note: PXa refuted; KILL does not fire
